The '''voxyn queen''' was the name given to the genetic template for all of the [[voxyn]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] killing creatures created by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. In about [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], the Yuuzhan Vong [[Shaper caste|Shapers]] mixed its appearance and abilities with that of a [[fero xyn]], a creature native to the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy]], and that of a [[vornskr]], a creature native to the planet [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was only trained to do whatever it took for her to stay alive. Eventually, the Jedi discovered that all voxyn were cloned from one template, and they sent a [[Myrkr strike team|strike team]] to kill the voxyn queen. When the strike team [[Mission to Myrkr|attacked]] the cloning facilty onboard the ''[[Baanu Rass]]'', a Yuuzhan Vong worldship, the other voxyn and the Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]] there did the best they could to protect her, killing several of the Jedi. Eventually, the Jedi reached the queen and she fought and was killed by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] by getting sucked into a [[dovin basal]]'s [[Black hole/Legends|black hole]] singularity.
